original_image_tags: Black-and-white photograph of a typed official document on "NEWFOUNDLAND CONSTABULARY" letterhead. The letterhead features a central crest/emblem with a cross. The document is dated July 13th, 1947. A large "RESTRICTED" stamp is visible at the bottom center. There are handwritten signatures and initials. The bottom corners have handwritten page numbers.

elements.description: A coat of arms featuring a shield with a cross and a unicorn-like figure on top, positioned at the top center of the document.

judge.reason: Description A describes a full typed document page with letterhead, signatures, and a 'RESTRICTED' stamp, while Description B describes only a coat of arms, indicating the descriptions are about fundamentally different visual content.
